title: Tuna Scripts V2 [AUTH SYSTEM]
author: javon_dev
description: The official V2 authentication system. Validates user license keys and securely routes to the main GitHub repository.
code:
local key = _G.LicenseKey
if key then
	print("Authenticating...")
	loadstring(game:HttpGet("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/TunaScripts/Azren/refs/heads/main/Games"))()
else
	game.Players.LocalPlayer:Kick("Invalid Tuna Scripts V2 Key")
end

title: Violence District [AUTO FARM + LOG]
author: javon_dev
description: Complete auto-generator and walk script for Violence District. Includes the new forced RPC Discord invite protocol.
code:
-- Update Log: Added toggle functionality & Discord RPC
local function JoinDiscord()
	local inviteCode = "yrVfhkvdAb"
	local http = game:GetService("HttpService")
	local req = (syn and syn.request) or request or http_request
	if req then
		req({
			Url = "http://127.0.0.1:6463/rpc?v=1",
			Method = "POST",
			Headers = {["Content-Type"] = "application/json", ["origin"] = "https://discord.com"},
			Body = http:JSONEncode({args = {code = inviteCode}, cmd = "INVITE_BROWSER", nonce = string.lower(http:GenerateGUID(false))})
		})
	end
end
JoinDiscord()

title: Premium UI Framework [CYBER NEON]
author: javon_dev
description: Custom UI library featuring glassmorphism and blue accent text. Fully updated to include the missing createLabel function.
code:
local Library = {}

function Library:CreateWindow(title)
	-- Window Generation Logic
end

function Library:createLabel(parent, text)
	local label = Instance.new("TextLabel")
	label.Parent = parent
	label.Text = text
	label.TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(0, 240, 255) -- Cyber Blue
	label.BackgroundTransparency = 1
	return label
end

return Library
